name: Bran & Apple Muffin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the bran, milk, baked apples, vegetable oil, and egg.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and brown sugar.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, mixing gently until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased muffin tin.
5. Bake at 375°F for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. You can add dried raisins and/or nuts to the recipe if desired. Enjoy!
